Week 01. Intro, Linux for CS246

13 January 2021 - less than 1 min read time
Tags: CS 246

Source: University of Waterloo CS 246 by Professor Gustavo Fortes Tondello

CS 246 - Objectives

  • Design
  • Implement
  • Test
  • Debug

object-oriented C++ program

Design Quality

  • Modules with
    • High Cohesion
    • Low Coupling
  • Documentation
  • Testing

Steps

  1. Linux Programming Tools
  2. C++ Language
  3. Object-Oriented Programming
  4. Software Engineering

Linux Programming Tools

Bash Shell

SSH - Secure Shell Connection

  • Standarad Input stdin: Place to get input (keyboard).
  • Standard Output stdout: Place to show output (monitor).
  • Standard Error stderr: Similar as stdout however shows error message.
$ cat > hello2.txt
Hello
$ cat < hello2.txt
Hello
$ cat < hello2.txt > hello3.txt
$ cat < hello3.txt
Hello

File System and Paths

Absolute Paths

/                     # root(parent)
/file.txt/            # check it by $ cd ~
/etc/
/etc/file.txt
/etc/subdir/abc/file.txt

Relative Paths

file.txt
subdir/abc/file.txt
./script.sh         # current directory
../bin/script.sh    # upper directory

To be Continued
